pre_mission.speaker: Lyria
pre_mission.line: That is quartermaster discipline. Not bandit instinct.

pre_mission.speaker: Aric
pre_mission.line: Then someone taught them how to wage a campaign.

battle_start.speaker: Sera
battle_start.line: Take the stairs. Hold each landing.

battle_start.speaker: Kain
battle_start.line: I will find the signal post.

post_mission.speaker: Lyria
post_mission.line: Aric... this belongs to royal stock.

post_mission.speaker: Kain
post_mission.line: That word is falling behind events.

post_mission.speaker: Sera
post_mission.line: If truth condemns the throne, what does duty become?
